summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LockBox secure login system with multi-factor authentication. All backend APIs and frontend integration working correctly.
passed_tests: User Registration - New user creation working
User Login - MFA flow initiated correctly
OTP Verification - Email OTP extraction and verification successful
Authenticated Endpoints - All security, analytics, settings, and device APIs working
Frontend Login Page - LOCKBOX branding and form functionality working
Login/Register Toggle - Mode switching working correctly
OTP Verification UI - 6-digit OTP input fields working properly
Dashboard Load - Security dashboard with tabs and analytics loading correctly
Settings Navigation - Lock configuration page accessible with toggles
Dark Cybersecurity Theme - Proper styling and green accent colors implemented
User Profile Display - Authenticated user email shown in dashboard
Security Score Display - 100% security score with posture indicators
Recent Activity Logs - Authentication events properly logged and displayed
